name: Remarcable Golf
about: RemarCable Golf is an indoor/outdoor golf academy specializing in instruction, club fitting, and simulator play. Utilizing Trackman technology, the facility offers year-round golf practice and improvement opportunities regardless of weather conditions. The academy caters to golfers of all skill levels, from beginners to competitive players, providing personalized coaching services and comprehensive club fitting solutions to enhance performance.
why_golfers_like_it: Latest Trackman technology for accurate ball and club tracking
Indoor/outdoor facility accessible in any weather
Comprehensive instruction and club fitting services
Junior golf programs tailored for individual child development

simulator_hardware.notes: Latest Trackman technology for club fitting and simulation

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue offers club fitting services, suggesting you can use their fitted clubs or bring your own for practice.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service on-site, so BYOB policies are unclear. It's best to contact the venue directly.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Using the simulator, 18 holes can typically be played in 1-2 hours depending on the pace of play and number of players in the bay.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, RemarCable Golf offers junior golf instruction and programs catered to each individual child's development.
